source_excerpt: Complaint Review. Following review and discussion of the investigative reports, the Committee elected to close the following fifteen complaints without further action or disciplinary process: Case Nos. 24-0112, 24-0125, 24-0138, 24-0141, 24-0156, 24-0160, 24-0171, 24-0189, 24-0194, 24-0203, 24-0211, 24-0219, 24-0226, 24-0230, and 24-0237.

correct_facts.quote: the Committee elected to close the following fifteen complaints without further action or disciplinary process

commentary: BULK entry - the only form where count > 1 is allowed. The document itself states the total ('fifteen complaints') and the quote contains that number, so one bulk entry with respondent=null and count=15 is correct. If the case numbers were individually meaningful actions (sanctions against named licensees), itemize instead; routine complaint closures listed only by case number are the classic bulk case. A bulk entry whose quote does not contain the number is rejected by the gate.
